title: HERO — Hook
text: Ek second sochiye... agar aapka saara BORING, repetitive kaam... koi aur kar de? Posting? Done. Trends track karna? Done. Reports banana? Done. Comments padhna? Done. Aur aap sirf CREATIVE kaam karo? Yeh sapna nahi hai. Yeh STAGE AI Playbook hai. Aur aaj ke baad... yeh aapki reality hogi.

title: Daily Time Waste — Everyone's Pain
text: Chaliye pehle sachhai dekhte hain. Aapki team mein har din KYA hota hai? Social media wale subah se raat tak post bana rahe hain, 5 platforms pe manually daal rahe hain, viral cheez miss ho rahi hai kyunki pata hi nahi chala. Content team trends track kar rahi hai, competition dekh rahi hai, comments padh rahi hai... SAB HAATHON SE. Marketing wale reports bana rahe hain, data nikal rahe hain, same format mein baar baar. Aur design? Har baar scratch se. Yeh sab ZARURI kaam hai... lekin kya yeh AAPKO karna chahiye? Ya yeh kaam koi aur kar sakta hai?

title: Social Media Team — Real Pain
text: Social media team ki baat karte hain. Ek naya show aaya STAGE pe. Ab kya hota hai? Caption likho Instagram ke liye. Tweet likho Twitter ke liye. Facebook post alag. WhatsApp status alag. YouTube community post alag. Har ek ka tone ALAG hona chahiye! Instagram mein fun chahiye. Twitter mein punchy chahiye. Yeh sab karne mein kitna time lagta hai? Aur jab kuch VIRAL ho raha hai? Tab tak team ko pata chale... moment khatam! 2-3 ghante lag jaate hain react karne mein. Tab tak trend nikal chuka hota hai.

title: Content Team — Real Pain
text: Content team ka haal aur bhi interesting hai. Sapna Choudhary ka naya gaana trending hai YouTube pe. Haryanvi audience PAGAL ho rahi hai. Lekin Stage pe woh gaana hai hi nahi! Competitor Chaupal pe hai. Humein PATA hi nahi chala! Aur users? Woh roz bol rahe hain... Gujarati shows chahiye, subtitles chahiye, download chahiye. Kahan bol rahe hain? App reviews mein. YouTube comments mein. Koi padh raha hai? Honestly... nahi. 1 lakh users ki awaaz... un-heard.

title: The Vision — What If AI Did All This?
text: Ab sochiye... KYA HOGA agar yeh SAB kaam AI kare? Subah 9 baje aapke phone pe aaye... boss, aaj yeh trending hai, Stage pe nahi hai, action lo. App reviews se automatically pata chale... is hafte sabse zyada yeh maanga gaya. Naya show aaye? 5 platforms ke posts TAYAAR mil jayein. Sirf approve karo. Kuch viral ho raha hai? 10 MINUTE mein alert aaye, draft post bhi ready. Yeh sab POSSIBLE hai. Aur yeh sab ek TOOL se hoga jo aapke laptop pe chalega. Koi coding nahi. Koi tech knowledge nahi. Bas... ek command.

title: Paperclip Use Cases — 4 Real Agents
text: Yeh tool hai Paperclip. Aur yeh hai 4 agents jo STAGE ke liye kaam karenge. PEHLA... Trend Watcher Agent! Yeh RAAT BHAR kaam karta hai. YouTube trending check karta hai... Haryanvi, Rajasthani, Bhojpuri. Instagram aur Twitter scan karta hai. Aur subah aapko BRIEFING deta hai, chai ke saath! Sapna Choudhary trending hai, Stage pe nahi hai, Chaupal pe hai, acquire karo! DOOSRA... Comment Intelligence Agent! Roz app reviews aur YouTube comments padhta hai. Patterns dhundta hai. Aur SORTED list deta hai... 47 logon ne Gujarati comedy maangi, 31 ne Rajasthani web series maangi. EK LAKH users ki survey... FREE MEIN! TEESRA... Posting Calendar Agent! Naya show upload hua? 5 MINUTES mein 5 platforms ke liye content ready. Instagram fun, Twitter punchy, Facebook detailed. Aap bus APPROVE karo. Ek click, 5 platforms DONE. CHAUTHA... aur yeh SABSE POWERFUL hai... Viral Moment Agent! Stage ka show viral ho raha hai? DUS MINUTE mein detect! Meme format suggest! Draft post ready! Aapke paas alert aata hai... YEH VIRAL HO RAHA HAI, ABHI POST KARO! 10 minute versus pehle 2-3 ghante.

title: Think About YOUR Role
text: Ab ek minute rukiye. Aur apne baare mein sochiye. Aap jo bhi kaam karte ho... usme kaunsa kaam hai jo ROZNAA repeat hota hai? Posting? Reports? Data collection? Tracking? Monitoring? Scheduling? Jo bhi kaam baar baar karo... woh ab se AGENT ka kaam hai. Tumhara kaam hai SOCHNA. DECIDE karna. CREATIVE hona. Boring kaam? Agent karega. Yeh nahi ki agent tumhari naukri le lega. Agent tumhara ASSISTANT hai. Tum BOSS ho. Agent kaam karta hai. Tum APPROVE karte ho.

title: What is the Playbook?
text: Toh yeh sab milega KAISE? Bahut simple hai. STAGE AI Playbook. Yeh kya hai? Ek setup script. Aap isko chalate ho, aur 5 minute mein aapke laptop pe sab kuch install ho jaata hai. Claude Code... jo aapka AI assistant hai. Gstack... jo Claude ko 30 se zyada superpowers deta hai. Paperclip... jo AI agents manage karta hai. 18 aur skill packs. Security rules. Design system. SAB kuch. Ek command. 5 minute. Koi tech knowledge NAHI chahiye.

title: 3 Tools Explained Simply
text: Teen tools hain. Pehla, Claude Code. Isko aise samjho ki aapke bagal mein ek bahut smart assistant baitha hai. Hindi mein bolo, English mein bolo... woh samjhega aur kar dega. Button ka color badalna ho? Bolo. Report banana ho? Bolo. Post likhna ho? Bolo. Doosra, Gstack. Yeh Claude ko alag alag MODES deta hai. Slash QA bolo, website test karega. Slash review bolo, code check karega. Slash design bolo, design review karega. 30 se zyada modes! Aur teesra, Paperclip. Yeh sabse khaas hai. Yeh AI agents ka MANAGER hai. Agents ko kaam deta hai. Track karta hai. Aur tumhare browser mein ek beautiful dashboard dikhata hai... kaunsa agent kya kar raha hai. SAB dikh raha hai.

title: Safety — Invisible Guardrails
text: Ab ek zaruri baat. AI powerful hai. Lekin bina rules ke, khatranaak bhi ho sakta hai. Bina playbook ke Claude kya kar sakta hai? Live app tod sakta hai. Passwords leak kar sakta hai. Bina test kiye bol sakta hai done! Scary hai na? LEKIN... playbook install hone ke baad? Claude KABHI passwords leak nahi karega. HAMESHA safe tarike se kaam karega. Test ZAROOR chalayega. Aur sabse ACHI baat? Yeh rules INVISIBLE hain! Tumhe kuch yaad rakhne ki zaroorat nahi. Playbook ne sab set kar diya. Tum bas kaam karo, tension mat lo.

title: How To Get Started
text: Toh shuru kaise karein? Dekho kitna simple hai. Terminal kholo. Teen lines paste karo. Git clone, cd stage playbook, aur dot slash setup dot sh. Ek menu aayega. Agar developer NAHI ho? Bas 8 dabao. 5 minute wait karo. DONE. Sab install ho jayega. Automatically. Koi sawaal nahi poochega.

title: Two Paths
text: Aur haan, do raaste hain. Pehla, AI Only Setup. Yeh SABKE liye hai. PMs, designers, marketers, content writers... koi bhi. Option 8 dabao, 5 minute, done. Doosra, Full Dev Setup. Yeh developers ke liye hai. Mobile app, backend, website, TV apps... sab install hota hai. 15 minute lagta hai. Dono mein ek hi command hai. Bas choice alag hai.

title: Closing CTA
text: Toh yaad rakhiye. Aaj ke baad, jo bhi kaam BAAR BAAR karna pade... woh agent ka kaam hai, tumhara nahi. Tumhara kaam hai sochna, decide karna, creative hona. Boring kaam? Automate karo. Teen lines. 5 minute. ZERO tech knowledge. STAGE... AI native since day one. Toh chalo... SHURU KARTE HAIN! Dhanyawaad!
